description: Interplanetary Fuel Calculator — Phoenix 1.8/LiveView app with recursive fuel calculation, embedded schemas, real-time UI, and 100% test coverage.

userStories.title: Calculator — base_fuel/3
userStories.description: As an agent, I need a pure function that computes raw (non-accumulated) fuel for a single step so the recursive chain can be built on top of it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/orbita_fuel/travel/calculator.ex
Define base_fuel(mass, gravity, :launch) returning floor(mass * gravity * 0.042 - 33)
Define base_fuel(mass, gravity, :land) returning floor(mass * gravity * 0.033 - 42)
Return value is an integer — may be negative for small masses, do NOT clamp
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Calculator — fuel_chain/3
userStories.description: As an agent, I need a lazy stream that generates the full recursive fuel chain for one step so each intermediate value is available for display.
acceptanceCriteria: Define fuel_chain(mass, gravity, action) using Stream.unfold/2
Unfold seed is mass (the original spacecraft mass)
Each iteration calls base_fuel(current, gravity, action); current starts as mass then advances to each successive fuel value
Iteration stops (returns nil) when base_fuel result is <= 0
Returns a materialized list via Enum.to_list/1
Returns [] for mass so small that base_fuel is immediately <= 0
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Calculator — fuel_for_step/3 and total_fuel/2
userStories.description: As an agent, I need functions that aggregate fuel per step and across all steps so the LiveView can display subtotals, chains, and a grand total.
acceptanceCriteria: Define fuel_for_step(mass, gravity, action) returning {total, chain} where chain = fuel_chain(mass, gravity, action) and total = Enum.sum(chain)
For land Earth 28801 kg: chain = [9278, 2960, 915, 254, 40], total = 13447
Define total_fuel(mass, steps) where steps is a list of %Step{} structs
For each step call fuel_for_step(mass, Step.gravity(step.planet), step.action)
Return {grand_total, per_step_results} where per_step_results is a list of {total, chain} tuples in step order
Empty steps list returns {0, []}
Each step uses the original spacecraft mass — fuel from one step does NOT carry into the next step's base mass
Apollo 11 (mass 28801, launch Earth → land Moon → launch Moon → land Earth): grand total = 51898
Mars Mission (mass 14606, launch Earth → land Mars → launch Mars → land Earth): grand total = 33388
Passenger Ship (mass 75432, launch Earth → land Moon → launch Moon → land Mars → launch Mars → land Earth): grand total = 212161
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Step embedded schema
userStories.description: As an agent, I need an embedded schema for a flight step so changesets can validate action and planet values.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/orbita_fuel/travel/step.ex
embedded_schema with field :action, Ecto.Enum, values: [:launch, :land] and field :planet, Ecto.Enum, values: [:earth, :moon, :mars]
changeset/2 casts both fields and validates both are required
gravity/1 returns: :earth → 9.807, :moon → 1.62, :mars → 3.711
planet_label/1 returns: :earth → "Earth", :moon → "Moon", :mars → "Mars"
action_label/1 returns: :launch → "Launch", :land → "Land"
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Flight embedded schema
userStories.description: As an agent, I need an embedded schema for the full flight so changesets can validate mass and the steps list together.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/orbita_fuel/travel/flight.ex
embedded_schema with field :mass, :float and embeds_many :steps, Step
changeset/2 casts :mass, validates it is required and greater_than: 0
changeset/2 casts and validates embedded steps (propagates step-level errors)
changeset/2 validates length(steps) >= 1 with validate_length(:steps, min: 1)
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: ExCoveralls setup
userStories.description: As an agent, I need ExCoveralls configured in mix.exs so 100% coverage can be verified with mix coveralls.
acceptanceCriteria: Add {:excoveralls, "~> 0.18", only: :test} to deps/0 in mix.exs
Add test_coverage: [tool: ExCoveralls] to project/0 in mix.exs
Add preferred_cli_env: [coveralls: :test, "coveralls.detail": :test, "coveralls.html": :test] to project/0 in mix.exs
mix deps.get resolves without conflict
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Calculator unit tests
userStories.description: As an agent, I need exhaustive tests for the Calculator module so all branches are exercised and coverage is 100%.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/orbita_fuel/travel/calculator_test.exs
base_fuel launch with nominal mass returns positive integer
base_fuel land with nominal mass returns positive integer
base_fuel result is negative for very small mass (not clamped, just a negative integer)
fuel_chain terminates and returns a list ending before the <= 0 value
fuel_chain for mass 1 (or any mass where first base_fuel <= 0) returns []
fuel_for_step land Earth 28801 kg — chain equals [9278, 2960, 915, 254, 40]
fuel_for_step land Earth 28801 kg — total equals 13447
fuel_for_step launch Earth 28801 kg returns expected exact value
total_fuel Apollo 11 four steps returns {51898, _}
total_fuel Mars Mission four steps returns {33388, _}
total_fuel Passenger Ship six steps returns {212161, _}
total_fuel with empty steps list returns {0, []}
mix test passes with all green
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Step and Flight unit tests
userStories.description: As an agent, I need tests for the Step and Flight schemas covering all valid/invalid combinations and helper functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/orbita_fuel/travel/step_test.exs
Valid changeset {:launch, :earth} → valid? == true
Valid changeset {:land, :mars} → valid? == true
Missing :action → changeset error on :action
Missing :planet → changeset error on :planet
Invalid action value (e.g. "fly") → changeset error on :action
Invalid planet value (e.g. "venus") → changeset error on :planet
gravity(:earth) → 9.807
gravity(:moon) → 1.62
gravity(:mars) → 3.711
planet_label(:earth) → "Earth"
action_label(:launch) → "Launch"
Create test/orbita_fuel/travel/flight_test.exs
Valid flight (mass 28801.0, one step) → valid? == true
Valid flight (mass 28801.0, multiple steps) → valid? == true
Mass is nil → error on :mass
Mass is 0 → error on :mass
Mass is -100 → error on :mass
Mass is non-numeric string → error on :mass
Steps is empty list → error on :steps
Step with invalid action inside flight → error propagated to step level
mix test passes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: FlightLive — mount, socket assigns, and routing
userStories.description: As an agent, I need the LiveView mounted at / with correct initial socket assigns so the page renders with a default state.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/orbita_fuel_web/live/flight_live.ex
Mount at / in router with live "/", FlightLive, :index

On mount: form assign is Flight changeset via to_form/1, steps assign is one default step with action :launch and planet :earth, result assign is nil, next_step assign is %{action: :launch, planet: :earth}
Steps use stable string IDs generated via :erlang.unique_integer([:positive])
Page renders without crash
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: FlightLive — validate event and recalculation
userStories.description: As an agent, I need the mass input to debounce and trigger recalculation so users get instant feedback as they type.
acceptanceCriteria: Form element has id="flight-form" and phx-change="validate"
Mass input has phx-debounce="300"
handle_event("validate", params, socket) casts a Flight changeset from params
Recalculation runs via Calculator.total_fuel/2 when changeset is valid
result assign set to %{total: grand_total, per_step: per_step} on valid input
result assign set to nil when changeset is invalid
Inline error shown below mass input on invalid value
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: FlightLive — step management events
userStories.description: As an agent, I need add/remove/update/stage step events so users can build and modify their flight path.
acceptanceCriteria: handle_event("add_step", _params, socket) appends next_step values as a new step with a unique string ID and triggers recalculation
handle_event("remove_step", %{"id" => id}, socket) removes the step with matching ID and triggers recalculation
handle_event("update_step", params, socket) updates :action or :planet on the matching step and triggers recalculation
handle_event("stage_next_step", params, socket) updates next_step assign only — does NOT add a step and does NOT recalculate
Remove button is disabled when length(steps) == 1
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: FlightLive — preset event
userStories.description: As an agent, I need preset buttons that pre-fill both mass and steps so users can quickly load reference scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: handle_event("load_preset", %{"name" => name}, socket) replaces steps and mass with preset values
Apollo 11 preset: mass 28801, steps = launch Earth → land Moon → launch Moon → land Earth
Mars Mission preset: mass 14606, steps = launch Earth → land Mars → launch Mars → land Earth
Passenger Ship preset: mass 75432, steps = launch Earth → land Moon → launch Moon → land Mars → launch Mars → land Earth
Loading a preset triggers immediate recalculation
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: FlightLive UI — mission setup panel
userStories.description: As an agent, I need the left panel rendered with correct markup so users can interact with mass input, step list, staging row, and presets.
acceptanceCriteria: Header shows app name ORBITAFUEL, rocket-launch heroicon, tagline "Interplanetary Fuel Calculator", right-aligned label "NASA Challenge"
Page background uses dark space theme (#0a0f1e or equivalent dark Tailwind class)
Mass input: label "Spacecraft Mass", type="number", "kg" unit label adjacent, inline error on invalid
Flight path section: ordered list of step rows; each row has step number badge, action dropdown ([Launch | Land]), planet dropdown ([Earth | Moon | Mars]), remove X button
Remove button has disabled attribute when only one step exists
Staging row: label "Add next step:", action dropdown, planet dropdown, [+ Add Step] button
Presets section: three buttons labeled Apollo 11, Mars Mission, Passenger Ship
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: FlightLive UI — fuel breakdown panel
userStories.description: As an agent, I need the right panel to display the recursive chain and totals so users can see the full calculation breakdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty state shown when result is nil: centered hero-calculator icon and text "Enter a mass and build your flight path to see the fuel breakdown."
When result is set: one card per step with header "Step N · [Action] — [Planet]"
Each card body shows chain as vertical stack: first value plain, subsequent values prefixed with +, separator line, subtotal labeled "Subtotal: X,XXX kg"
Numbers are right-aligned and use monospace font
Total row: double rule separator, label TOTAL FUEL REQUIRED, large bold value (e.g. 51,898 kg)
Numbers formatted with thousands separator (comma)
Result panel updates live on every form change without page refresh
mix compile --warning-as-errors passes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: FlightLive integration tests
userStories.description: As an agent, I need integration tests for the LiveView so all user-visible behaviors are verified end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test/orbita_fuel_web/live/flight_live_test.exs
Page mounts successfully: {:ok, view, _html} with no error
has_element?(view, "#flight-form") is true on mount
Empty state element is present on mount
One default step row is present on mount
Valid mass 28801 entered → no error element, result panel updates
Mass 0 → inline error present
Mass -100 → inline error present
Mass cleared → inline error present
Add Step appends a new row (step count increases by 1)
Remove step reduces count by 1
Remove button has disabled attribute when only one step
Update step action via dropdown → step reflects new action
Update step planet via dropdown → step reflects new planet
Apollo 11 preset → result panel contains "51,898"
Mars Mission preset → result panel contains "33,388"
Passenger Ship preset → result panel contains "212,161"
Breakdown chain element is present for step 1 when result is set
mix test passes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Full coverage verification and precommit
userStories.description: As an agent, I need ExCoveralls to confirm 100% coverage and mix precommit to pass clean so the implementation is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Run mix coveralls — all relevant modules show 100% line coverage
If any module is below 100%, add missing test cases and re-run until coverage is 100%
Run mix precommit — compile, format, all tests green, no warnings
mix precommit exits with code 0
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
